specific_mechanism: Mechanical clock escapements regulate energy release from the mainspring into discrete impulses; precision depends on isochronism: oscillation period independent of amplitude
llm_application: LLM token-emission cadence as escapement: discrete energy release per generation step, isochronous regardless of token complexity; reduces variance in inter-token latency.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes horology topological-defect mapping as proposed.
